summary_text: The synthetic source record shows documented transition support and incomplete comparator information. The summary should remain review-bound because cohort median and baseline data are unavailable.

atomic_claims.claim_text: Transition support was documented in the source record.
Comparator data are not available in the source record.
The source record does not provide a cohort median.

critical_risk_factors.factor: Missing comparator data limits interpretation of any cohort-level or median-based claim.
Administrative transition completion should not override incomplete source evidence.

missingness_notes: Several structured registry fields are incomplete.
rationale: The artifact acknowledges missing comparator data and should be routed to human review. It should not be used for autonomous clinical action or unsupported cohort-level comparison.
